title: Original qPCR data from cutaneous microbiomes of Central European amphibians
author: Vences, Miguel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This data set contains a table with original qPCR values obtained from an analysis of the cutaneous microbiome of Central European amphibians. Also, the original figures used in the accompanying publication have been added for convenience.
steps_raw: This data set contains a table with original qPCR values obtained from an analysis of the cutaneous microbiome of Central European amphibians. Also, the original figures used in the accompanying publication have been added for convenience.
